title: Wine
writer: Philip Lonergan, William MacHarg, Raymond L. Schrock
actors: Clara Bow, Forrest Stanley, Huntley Gordon
plot: John Warriner, facing financial ruin, accepts the proposal of a bootlegger, Benedict, to underwrite the business of illegal wine-selling. His daughter, Angela, takes up with the jazz set and is caught in a raid, at a cafe owned by...
